originalTitle: Watch: Three things to know about SpaceX's stock market debut
summary: The BBC's Samira Hussain explains everything you need to know about SpaceX's historic IPO.
content:
SpaceX shares have begun trading on the US stock exchange, marking what could be the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history.

The BBC's Samira Hussain explains what it means for SpaceX's future and for the company's CEO, Elon Musk, who is set to become the world's first trillionaire.

Niagara Falls: Is there a better spot to watch a World Cup game?

Football fans gathered at a FIFA World Cup watch party at Niagara Falls for the Canadian and USA teams' opening matches.

Watch: Why is Trump not at the World Cup?

All three leaders of the North America host nations have missed the tournament opening matches.

'We'll go crazy for a goal' - Excitement builds ahead of USA World Cup match

The BBC spoke to US fans at the Fifa Fan Festival in Los Angeles ahead of the team's match against Paraguay.

Watch: David Beckham receives star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame

The former footballer was joined by his wife Victoria Beckham and their children, as well as actor Tom Cruise.

How much did these fans pay for their World Cup tickets?

Bosnia-Herzegovina fans attending the team's game in Toronto, Canada spoke to the BBC about how costly their trip and seats were.

Tornadoes, severe weather hit US Midwest

Severe weather has torn through the midwest, destroying homes, disrupting flights, and knocking out power for thousands across the region.

Was it an overreaction to cancel buses and trains after disorder?

Translink apologised, saying "it was prioritising keeping staff, passengers, and the wider public safe".

School 'blown away' by dog birthday video reaction

The clip subsequently went viral, something co-headteacher Paul Bailey says took them by surprise.

Watch: Four UFO videos newly declassified by US government

The eyewitness footage shows bright orbs in the sky over an undisclosed location in the northeastern US.

Moment 500ft Welsh landmark is demolished in controlled explosion

The power station was completed in 1964 and has been a landmark in the Vale of Glamorgan for decades.

Huge fire destroys warehouse outside San Francisco

Staff at the medical equipment distribution centre were evacuated and all personnel were accounted for, the company said.

Government crackdown on illegal migrants to 'intensify'

The UK government says its going to crackdown on illegal migrants living in Northern Ireland.

Baby elephant plays ball in time for World Cup

It is seen playing with a ball in his enclosure, only two days after his arrival.

Church bells heard for first time in 100 years

The peal of a full set of a 14th Century church's bells is heard once again across a parish.

Watch the latest news summary from BBC World News. International news updated 24 hours a day.

Thailand’s royal household announces death of Princess Bajrakitiyabha

The princess had been in a coma for more than three years, and was 47 at the time of her death.

Watch: Argentine World Cup fans who had US visas rejected given free TVs

The company behind the campaign said the first 100 people who could prove they had their US visa rejected would receive a television to watch the matches from home.

Watch: Fans celebrate Mexico's win in World Cup opening match

There were wild celebrations in host nation Mexico, as their team kicked off their World Cup campaign with a 2-0 win over South Africa.

'Once in a lifetime' - Mexico fans share excitement as World Cup kicks off

The BBC spoke to match-goers outside Azteca Stadium, where Mexico began the tournament with a 2-0 victory over South Africa.

Flip flop or deliberate? - Unpacking Trump’s strategy on Iran

The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue looks at the US president's mixed messaging over the war and the questions it raises.
chineseTitle: 观看：关于 SpaceX 上市的三件事
chineseSummary: BBC 的萨米拉·侯赛因 (Samira Hussain) 解释了有关 SpaceX 历史性 IPO 的所有信息。
chineseContent:
SpaceX 股票已开始在美国证券交易所交易，这可能是历史上规模最大的首次公开募股 (IPO)。

BBC 的萨米拉·侯赛因 (Samira Hussain) 解释了这对 SpaceX 的未来以及该公司首席执行官埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 意味着什么，后者将成为世界上第一位万亿富翁。

尼亚加拉大瀑布：还有更好的观看世界杯比赛的地方吗？

球迷聚集在尼亚加拉瀑布举行的国际足联世界杯观看派对上，观看加拿大队和美国队的揭幕战。

观看：特朗普为何缺席世界杯？

北美主办国的三位领导人都缺席了世界杯揭幕战。

“我们会为进球而疯狂”——美国世界杯比赛前兴奋不已

在球队对阵巴拉圭队的比赛之前，英国广播公司在洛杉矶举行的国际足联球迷节上与美国球迷进行了交谈。

观看：大卫·贝克汉姆在好莱坞星光大道上获得星星

这位前足球运动员与他的妻子维多利亚·贝克汉姆和他们的孩子以及演员汤姆·克鲁斯一起参加了活动。

这些球迷为世界杯门票支付了多少钱？

观看球队在加拿大多伦多举行的比赛的波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那球迷向 BBC 讲述了他们的旅行和座位费用有多么昂贵。

恶劣天气席卷中西部，房屋被毁，航班中断，该地区数千人断电。

骚乱后取消公交车和火车是否反应过度？

Translink 对此表示歉意，并表示“它优先考虑确保员工、乘客和广大公众的安全”。

狗生日视频反应让学校“震惊”

这段视频随后在网上疯传，联席校长保罗·贝利 (Paul Bailey) 表示，这让他们感到惊讶。

观看：美国政府新解密的四个 UFO 视频

目击者的镜头显示，美国东北部一个秘密地点上空出现了明亮的球体。

500英尺高的威尔士地标在受控爆炸中被摧毁的时刻

该电站于 1964 年竣工，几十年来一直是格拉摩根谷的地标性建筑。

旧金山郊外的大火烧毁了仓库

该公司表示，医疗设备配送中心的工作人员已被疏散，所有人员均已下落不明。

政府“加大力度”打击非法移民

英国政府表示将打击居住在北爱尔兰的非法移民。

小象在世界杯前及时踢球

人们看到它在他的围栏里玩球，此时距离他到达仅两天。

100年来首次听到教堂钟声

整个教区再次听到全套 14 世纪教堂的钟声。

泰国王室宣布巴吉拉吉蒂雅芭公主去世

公主已经昏迷了三年多，去世时47岁。

观看：美国签证被拒的阿根廷世界杯球迷可免费看电视

该活动背后的公司表示，前 100 名能够证明自己的美国签证被拒绝的人将获得一台电视，可以在家观看比赛。

观看：球迷庆祝墨西哥队在世界杯揭幕战中获胜

主办国墨西哥举行了疯狂的庆祝活动，他们的球队以 2-0 战胜南非队拉开了世界杯征程。

“一生一次”——墨西哥球迷在世界杯开幕时分享兴奋

BBC 采访了阿兹特克体育场外的观众，墨西哥队在阿兹特克体育场以 2-0 击败南非队开始了比赛。

随波逐流还是故意？ - 解读特朗普的伊朗战略

英国广播公司 (BBC) 的加里·奥多诺霍 (Gary O'Donoghue) 探讨了美国总统关于战争及其引发的问题的复杂信息。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
